disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute onset of panic, racing heart and a headache about two hours ago, immediately after viewing a low platelet result on an online patient portal
trigger_question_examples: What happened just before this started?
When did you first start feeling like this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about two hours ago, right after I saw my blood test on the portal and read that my platelets were low. My heart started pounding and I got this awful headache.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The headache is a gradual, throbbing, tight band-like ache across the forehead and around the head — not sudden, not explosive, and not the worst of the person's life
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the headache — did it come on suddenly or build up?
Is this the worst headache you've ever had, or more of a tight, aching pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It built up over a while rather than hitting me all at once. It's a tight, throbbing band around my head — not an explosion, but I keep thinking it must be a bleed.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't know how to describe it, I'm just scared it's a brain bleed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No focal neurological symptoms — denies one-sided weakness, numbness, slurred speech, visual change or vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Any weakness or numbness on one side, trouble speaking, or changes to your vision?
Have you vomited or felt confused?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — my arms and legs feel normal, my speech is fine and my vision is okay. I haven't been sick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No active bleeding — denies nosebleeds, bleeding gums, blood in the urine, black or bloody stools, or vomiting blood
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any bleeding — nosebleeds, bleeding gums, blood in your urine or stool?
Any bleeding that won't stop anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no bleeding anywhere — no nosebleeds, my gums are fine, nothing in the toilet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On self-inspection reports no new bruising, no purple patches and no pinpoint red spots on the skin
trigger_question_examples: Can you look at your arms and legs — any new bruises or tiny red spots?
Do you see any purple patches or a pinprick rash?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been checking obsessively and I can't see any new bruises or little red spots — my skin looks the same as always.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prominent autonomic arousal — palpitations, fast breathing, a sense of impending doom and compulsive checking behaviour
trigger_question_examples: How is your breathing and your heart rate feeling?
How are you feeling in yourself emotionally right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is racing, I'm breathing really fast, and I have this overwhelming sense that something terrible is about to happen. I can't stop checking my skin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Takes no blood-thinning or anti-platelet medication
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any medications, especially blood thinners or aspirin?
Are you on any regular tablets at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any regular medications, and definitely nothing like a blood thinner or aspirin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports a recently discovered mildly low platelet count (around 75) on routine testing, with no prior bleeding problems
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the blood test result you saw.
Have you had blood problems before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A routine blood test recently showed my platelets were about 75, which a website said is dangerously low. I've never had any bleeding trouble before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No bone pain, night sweats, unexplained weight loss, recurrent infections or profound fatigue
trigger_question_examples: Any bone pain, drenching night sweats, weight loss or unusual tiredness recently?
Have you been getting a lot of infections?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of that — no bone pain, no night sweats, my weight is stable and I haven't been getting sick more than usual.
